---
title: 'Azarea Anne Wolfe'
date: '2010-12-07T16:55:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Azarea Anne Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5057547205446176055'
blogger_filename: '/2010/12/azarea-anne-wolfe.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Azarea Anne Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
---

I want to keep a journal for you. I hope we both enjoy it.
